checks: if command -v arm-none-eabi-gcc >/dev/null 2>&1; then arm-none-eabi-gcc --version >/dev/null; else echo 'Missing arm-none-eabi-gcc' >&2; exit 1; fi
if [ -f Makefile ]; then make -j clean all; else echo 'Missing Makefile for GCC MCU build' >&2; exit 1; fi

if command -v arm-none-eabi-size >/dev/null 2>&1; then find build -type f \( -name '*.elf' -o -name '*.axf' \) -print0 | xargs -0 -r arm-none-eabi-size | tee build/lab-size-report.txt; else echo 'Missing arm-none-eabi-size' >&2; exit 1; fi

if [ -f CMakeLists.txt ]; then cmake -S . -B build/lab-host-tests -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Debug -DBUILD_TESTING=ON -DUNIT_TESTS=ON && cmake --build build/lab-host-tests -j && ctest --test-dir build/lab-host-tests --output-on-failure; else echo 'Host-side gtest stage skipped: no CMakeLists.txt'; fi
